title: .NET & Azure Consulting
tagline: Software that stays up on your busiest day and stays easy to evolve, designed and coded by someone who still ships to production.
summary: With 15+ years designing software, I help you make the right calls from the start, hold up when traffic spikes, and regain control of a codebase that has become hard to maintain.
highlights: Software that stays up under load, even on your busiest day
A healthy codebase you can change without breaking everything
Fewer bugs in production thanks to reliable, automated releases
When something breaks, you instantly know what's running and why
Your data and your secrets stay protected
The right hosting for your situation, in France, Europe or elsewhere, with no forced lock-in

useCases.title: Regain control of a platform that's slowing down
useCases.description: A clear diagnosis of what you have, a step-by-step recovery plan, and hands-on support for your teams through to production, without stopping everything.

useCases.title: Get ready for fast growth
useCases.description: We lay foundations that can absorb ten times the traffic, so your commercial success never turns into an outage.

faq.question: What's your daily rate?
faq.answer: On request, depending on scope, duration, and level of involvement.

faq.question: Remote work?
faq.answer: Yes, full-remote or hybrid. I occasionally travel to Lyon, Paris, Geneva and Fribourg.

faq.question: Do you take on existing projects?
faq.answer: Yes. Auditing and modernizing an app that's already in place is part of my day-to-day.

title: Tech Lead
tagline: A team that ships on time, grows more independent and keeps the product solid, I take technical ownership alongside you.
summary: As a tech lead, I connect your product goals to technical decisions, settle the choices that shape the future, grow your team's skills, and make sure quality never slips.
highlights: Clear technical decisions, aligned with your product priorities
A team that improves, through code review and pairing
Developers who are more independent and more confident
Smooth dialogue between engineering, product and design
Delivery under control, with quality indicators tracked

useCases.title: Interim tech lead
useCases.description: While you recruit the right person, I take the reins so the team keeps moving without losing its way.

useCases.title: Coaching a new tech lead
useCases.description: 3-to-6-month pairing to pass on the right reflexes, the tooling, and the posture.

faq.question: What's your daily rate?
faq.answer: On request, depending on scope, duration, and level of involvement.

faq.question: Team size?
faq.answer: 3 to 10 people ideally; beyond that, we discuss structure.

faq.question: Do you hire?
faq.answer: I take part in technical interviews but don't own recruitment end-to-end.

title: Trainer
tagline: Teams that genuinely level up on .NET, Azure and AI, 3,000+ hours taught, by a consultant who codes every day.
summary: 3,000+ hours of training under my belt, across two decades of the Microsoft ecosystem. To junior devs and to tech leads stepping back for perspective alike, in schools (Supinfo, NextFormation) or large centres (ORSYS, IP-Formation, Happly), on-site, virtual classroom or bespoke in-house. Twenty modules in the catalogue below, pick them as-is, or let's recompose them into the program that fits your team.
highlights: Your developers build modern, production-ready web apps (ASP.NET Core, Blazor)
Your teams master the Azure cloud and pass the AZ-204 and AZ-400 certifications
Better-structured code that's simpler to evolve over time
Fewer regressions, thanks to automated tests that bring peace of mind
Faster, safer releases, no stress on launch day
Your teams adopt AI coding without giving up on quality
A program assembled bespoke from several modules, tuned to your team

useCases.title: Inter-company · 3 days
useCases.description: Catalogue sessions delivered at ORSYS, IP-Formation or in virtual classroom. Individual sign-ups, mixed audience: web development, cloud, architecture, certification prep.

useCases.title: Bespoke in-house
useCases.description: A program tailored with you: we start from your real needs, pick the modules, and adjust the depth and examples to your own code.

useCases.title: À-la-carte program
useCases.description: Start from one official module as the backbone (e.g. AZ-204), add two or three adjacent modules to cover exactly your team's scope, neither too short nor too long.

faq.question: What's your training day rate?
faq.answer: 600–800 € per day depending on module and format, or an inter / in-house package. Quoted within 24h from a short brief.

faq.question: Remote training?
faq.answer: Yes, synchronous virtual classroom, pair exercises, screen-share demos, live feedback. Same rigour as on-site.

faq.question: Certified?
faq.answer: No Microsoft certification: what I bring is 15+ years of hands-on .NET/Azure in production and 3,000+ hours of training. My exam-prep modules (AZ-204, AZ-400) are grounded in that real-world experience.

faq.question: How do you build a custom program?
faq.answer: We start from a catalogue module that covers the core of your need, identify what's missing and what's superfluous, borrow chapters from adjacent modules, calibrate duration. The brief takes one 30-minute call.

faq.question: What about funding mechanisms?
faq.answer: Partner centres (ORSYS, IP-Formation, NextFormation) are Qualiopi-certified: OPCO, CPF entreprise, skills-development plans. For direct in-house, I point you to the right scheme.

title: Develop faster with AI
tagline: Your developers faster with AI, without ever taking it at its word: every generated line gets reviewed.
summary: AI coding assistants are reshaping developers' daily work. I help you turn that into a real gain: which tools to choose, which rules to set, how to measure progress, and above all how to keep ownership of the quality of what's produced.
highlights: Your teams adopt the right AI tools, chosen for your context
A clear usage framework, shared by the whole team
A review method that guarantees the quality of generated code
Automatic guardrails before every release to production
Concrete support, from the first attempt to delivery
A measured gain, with numbers, before and after

useCases.title: Pilot with a willing team
useCases.description: A 2-to-3-month framed pilot, then a clear debrief and recommendation for rolling it out.

useCases.title: Org-wide deployment
useCases.description: Rollout across the whole organization, with a best-practice guide and a support structure.

useCases.title: AI-generated code audit
useCases.description: Spot the weak points, secure what has already been generated, and put humans back in the loop.

faq.question: What's your day rate for vibe-coding work?
faq.answer: 600–800 € per day depending on scope. These engagements are coaching and transmission, with significant time spent in pair-programming.

faq.question: Does it work on our stack?
faq.answer: Today's tools work whatever your language. We validate on your code base together.

faq.question: Code confidentiality?
faq.answer: We pick a setup that fits your constraints: online service, self-hosted, or with zero data retention.

faq.question: Do you keep humans in the loop?
faq.answer: Yes, the promise isn't 'fewer devs', it's 'more effective devs who keep ownership'. Every generated line gets reviewed.

faq.question: How long for a pilot?
faq.answer: 4 to 6 weeks, team of 3 to 5 devs, with a measured result.

title: AI for the enterprise
tagline: AI inside your company, under your control: your data never leaves home, and your usage stays measurable.
summary: Generative AI is reaching the enterprise. I help you adopt it while keeping control: your data with you, integrations that genuinely serve your business, and an impact you can actually measure.
highlights: AI hosted on your premises, your data never leaves
Your tools and internal knowledge made available to your teams' AI
A site better spotted and quoted by AI (ChatGPT, Perplexity)
Audience measurement that includes traffic coming from AI, GDPR-compliant
A clear framework on where your data and your queries live
European sovereign hosting when compliance requires it
AI impact tracked right inside your existing dashboards

useCases.title: AI installed on your premises
useCases.description: For a strong confidentiality need: model selection, hardware sizing, integration with your internal tools.

useCases.title: Connect AI to your tools
useCases.description: Link your information systems or knowledge base to your developers' assistants, to multiply their productivity.

useCases.title: Be visible in AI answers
useCases.description: Make your site readable and quotable by AI, so it surfaces in Perplexity or ChatGPT answers.

faq.question: What's your day rate?
faq.answer: 600–800 € per day depending on scope, technical setup and coaching engagement.

faq.question: Why self-host AI rather than use ChatGPT/Claude?
faq.answer: Your data stays with you, you stay compliant with GDPR and your sector, and the cost stays under control on heavy usage.

faq.question: Which models do you install?
faq.answer: Llama, Qwen, Mistral, Gemma, the choice depends on your use case (coding, search, summarization) and available hardware.

faq.question: What's an MCP server, exactly?
faq.answer: A standard connector between an AI and your tools: your internal apps, your documentation and your business data become directly usable by the AI.

faq.question: Will you touch our existing marketing measurement?
faq.answer: No, we extend what's there. We add AI-usage tracking without breaking anything already in place.

title: Mobile app development
tagline: Your app on iPhone and Android at once, without building it twice, from mockup to store launch.
summary: Mobile apps for your customers or your teams, running on both iPhone and Android from a single build. From the first mockup all the way to going live on the stores.
highlights: We validate feasibility together before you invest
A polished mobile experience, tested on mockup before development
A complete app, from mobile through to the server
Published for you on the App Store and Play Store
Maintained and improved over time
Your data hosted wherever you want, in Europe if needed

useCases.title: Business app for your teams
useCases.description: A field tool for your staff that works even without a connection and links to your internal tools.

useCases.title: Consumer app
useCases.description: A fast first version, then improvements guided by your users' feedback.

faq.question: Native iOS?
faq.answer: Yes when justified. By default I favour a single build for both platforms, which is more cost-efficient.

faq.question: Who owns Apple/Google accounts?
faq.answer: You. I support creation and submissions.

title: Website development
tagline: A fast, accessible, well-ranked website, from elegant showcase to custom business app.
summary: Websites that load fast, that Google rewards, and that everyone can use. From elegant showcase to complex business web app, built on modern foundations that are easy to keep alive.
highlights: A design built for your brand and your visitors
A site on modern foundations, simple to evolve over time
Strong search ranking and top-tier load times
A handover so you can run your site on your own
Hosted wherever makes most sense for you, in France or Europe

useCases.title: Premium showcase site
useCases.description: An editorial site with a strong identity and blazing performance, perfect to embody a brand.

useCases.title: Business web application
useCases.description: Customer portal, back-office, complex processes, connection to your internal tools.

faq.question: Do you design too?
faq.answer: On small projects yes. On identity-driven projects I collaborate with designers.

faq.question: Maintenance?
faq.answer: Maintenance contract or ad-hoc pricing, to suit your needs.
